name: Segment
description: Sync sources, destinations, and workspace data from Segment CDP.

install_fields.label: Access Token
install_fields.help: Your Segment Public API access token. Found in Segment → Settings → Access Management → Tokens. Requires workspace:read scope at minimum.

install_fields.label: Workspace Slug
install_fields.help: Optional. Your Segment workspace slug (visible in the workspace URL). Used for constructing direct links to resources.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate the access token via GET /workspaces. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with the failure reason.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /workspaces and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE with the Segment workspace name.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Full sync: fetches all sources (cursor-paginated), spaces, and functions. Normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Workspaces
methods.description: Retrieve the single workspace associated with the access token.

methods.name: List Sources
methods.description: Cursor-based paginated list of all Segment sources in the workspace.

methods.name: Get Source
methods.description: Retrieve a single source by ID.

methods.name: List Destinations
methods.description: Retrieve all destinations connected to a specific source.

methods.name: List Spaces
methods.description: Retrieve all Segment Profiles AI spaces in the workspace.

methods.name: List Functions
methods.description: Cursor-based paginated list of all Segment functions (source, destination, insert).

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Ping GET /workspaces and return current health with workspace name.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Fetch sources, spaces, and functions; normalize and ingest.

apis.name: List Workspaces
apis.description: GET /workspaces — returns the single workspace for the token.
